name: Analytics for CTA and Wishlist
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can track analytics for custom call-to-action buttons and wishlist interactions to measure engagement with these features and understand their impact on customer behavior. This data helps you assess feature performance and identify opportunities to optimize these conversion tools."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing analytics tracking for CTAs and wishlist functionality provides insights into how customers interact with these features, helping you understand which actions drive engagement and conversion. By monitoring clicks, additions, and subsequent behaviors, you can make data-driven decisions about feature placement, messaging, and optimization to improve their effectiveness."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This documentation provides a step-by-step guide to adding analytics for tracking clicks on Call-To-Actions (CTA) and Wishlist items within our app for Shopify. This ensures you can monitor user interactions and gather valuable data for your store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Verify Existing Click Events"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We may already be tracking clicks on Product Cards. To verify this:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.js", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Look for existing click event listeners, especially those related to CTAs and Wishlist buttons."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Test by clicking on these elements and checking if events are triggered."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To test the events:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open your website in a browser."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Right-click and select\u00a0"}, {"text": "Inspect", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to open the Developer Tools."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Network", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0tab."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Click on a Product Card, CTA, or Wishlist button."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Look for a request similar to\u00a0"}, {"text": "feedback?key=", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0in the Network tab."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you find the event, no further action is needed. If not, proceed to add custom events."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Adding Custom Analytics Events"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If click events are not being tracked for CTAs and Wishlist buttons, follow these steps to add the necessary analytics code."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "In\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.js", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Locate the CTA and Wishlist button elements in your JavaScript file."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add event listeners to these elements to send analytics events when they are clicked. The method for adding analytics to CTAs and Wishlist buttons varies depending on the structure of these components. However, generally, you need to add the following code to track clicks on your CTAs and Wishlist buttons:"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "findify.core.analytics.sendEvent('click-item',  {      rid: findify.grid.state.meta.rid,      item_id: id,      variant_item_id: selectedVariantId  },  false)", "code": true}]}], "lang": "yaml"}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Testing the Implementation"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After adding the custom events:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open your website in a browser."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Right-click and select\u00a0"}, {"text": "Inspect", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to open the Developer Tools."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Network", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0tab."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Click on the CTA and Wishlist buttons."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Look for a request similar to\u00a0"}, {"text": "feedback?key=", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0in the Network tab."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You should see events being sent to our analytics service."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
